ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the plant is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the plant is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the plant is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the plant */,
  "plant_capacity" REAL /* Plant capacity in millions of cubic feet per day (MMcf/d) */,
  "plant_flow" REAL /* Plant flow rate in millions of cubic feet per day (MMcf/d) */,
  "btu_content" REAL /* BTU content of the gas */,
  "dry_gas_storage" REAL /* Dry gas storage capacity in millions of cubic feet (MMcf) */,
  "ng_liquids_storage" REAL /* Natural gas liquids (NGL) storage capacity in gallons */,
  "owner_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner company */,
  "operator_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator company */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., EIA-757, Natural Gas Processing Plant Survey) */,
  "x_coord" REAL /* X-coordinate for the plant location */,
  "y_coord" REAL /* Y-coordinate for the plant location */,
  "plant_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the plant (e.g., operational, maintenance, shutdown) */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the plant was commissioned */,
  "shutdown_date" TEXT /* Date the plant was last shut down, if applicable */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude for more precise location tracking */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude for more precise location tracking */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the plant */,
  "pipeline_connections" INTEGER /* Number of pipeline connections */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the plant record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_owner_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_operator_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the company was established */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in (e.g., energy, utilities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "plant_capacity" REAL /* Plant capacity in millions of cubic feet per day (MMcf/d) */,
  "plant_flow" REAL /* Plant flow rate in millions of cubic feet per day (MMcf/d) */,
  "btu_content" REAL /* BTU content of the gas */,
  "dry_gas_storage" REAL /* Dry gas storage capacity in millions of cubic feet (MMcf) */,
  "ng_liquids_storage" REAL /* Natural gas liquids (NGL) storage capacity in gallons */,
  "gas_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the gas (e.g., methane content, impurities) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level at the plant */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the plant */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure level at the plant */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last metric update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_metrics_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., scheduled, unscheduled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the maintenance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_maintenance_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation or safety standard being checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the compliance */,
  "compliance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the compliance is valid (in days) */,
  "next_compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next compliance check */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the compliance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_compliance_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "financial_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial record */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the plant */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Expenses incurred by the plant */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit or loss of the plant */,
  "taxes_paid" REAL /* Amount of taxes paid by the plant */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit after taxes */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the financial record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_financials_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., plant operator, engineer, executive) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the plant data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, permit, certification) */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "doc_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_documents_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., safety, operational) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., resolved, in progress) */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the plant where the incident occurred */,
  "responders" TEXT /* List of responders involved in handling the incident */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was resolved */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the incident record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_incidents_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)
